validation_gates.reason: Verified public repository identity, default branch, pinned base, target blob, authenticated admin permission, scoped branch, and absence of a matching open pull request.

The target remains under the canonical singular policy responsibility root; the generated receipt uses the existing data/receipts/generated provenance lane. No parallel contract, schema, evidence, proof, release, or publication authority was created.

Inspected the target, parent and sibling policy lanes, evidence contracts and schemas, fixtures, validators, tests, resolver package, PolicyDecision shape, proposed ADRs, drift register, workflow inventory, CODEOWNERS, and pull-request template at the pinned base.

Replaced only a one-line greenfield stub and surfaced EvidenceBundle naming drift, proposed ADR status, missing evidence policy implementation, and the absent evidence value in the current PolicyDecision policy_family enum.

Local checks confirmed 528 lines, one H1, complete KFM Meta Block markers, balanced code fences, no trailing whitespace, grounded relative links, an evidence ledger, open verification register, and rollback section.

Inspected applicable pull-request workflows. Relevant jobs use GitHub-hosted runners and read-only contents permission without secrets, OIDC, deployment, release, or publication authority; major-version rather than immutable action pinning remains visible.

Verified branch head 4e982eda2694887f17660c4032ee4666f7cc2d17, exact README byte equality, returned blob a940ded7c4ae299dd5e6a70764c1e7dd7292b9e7, and a one-file base-to-head diff before adding this required receipt.

The documentation adds no credentials, private source payloads, living-person records, genomic data, or exact sensitive locations and preserves fail-closed treatment without exposing protected examples.

No accepted evidence-policy rule, resolver implementation, policy bundle, evaluator binding, obligation interpreter, runtime consumer, receipt emitter, or release integration was established or changed.
The API-only task had no mounted checkout. Existing pull-request workflows are expected to provide current remote schema, contract, policy-readiness, and resolver-readiness results.
Human review remains pending on the draft pull request.
